title: 雨巷里的红信
subtitle: 成稿漫画页示例
artDirection: Finished full-color vertical comic pages with clean gutters, readable mobile action, editable HTML captions, and no readable text baked into generated artwork.

chapters.title: 第一话：雨没有停
chapters.summary: 少女快递员接下一封必须在午夜前送达的红信。

panels.alt: A finished comic page showing a courier seeing a red danger path in a rainy city.
panels.caption: 雨把整座城洗得像一张未干的画。
dialogue: 只要送到塔顶，一切就结束了。
panels.prompt: Finished full-color vertical comic page, rainy neon city courier thriller, clean gutters, no text, no logo, no watermark.

panels.alt: A finished comic page showing a rescue action and a surveillance-room hook.
panels.caption: 门开了，却没有邀请她进去。
panels.prompt: Finished full-color vertical comic page, rescue action and surveillance-room hook, clean gutters, no text, no logo, no watermark.
